sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2022-01-01');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 1 WEEK) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 3 DAY) AS modified_date FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
